notes: Sakana AI is the Tokyo research lab behind the AI Scientist and evolutionary model merging, co-founded by David Ha and Llion Jones; the name is the Japanese word for fish (ť≠ö / „Āē„Āč„Ā™), evoking a school of fish forming a coherent whole from simple rules. Japanese says it flat and even-weighted ‚ÄĒ sah kah nah, three even morae (heiban, no accented syllable). English speakers commonly anglicize it to suh-KAH-nuh; the reading to avoid is the banana-rhyming suh-KAN-uh, which flattens the middle vowel to the wrong quality.
